name: canvaslive
description: Real-time multiplayer whiteboard with WebSocket live cursors and operational-transform conflict resolution.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c magenta,green,cyan "npm -w shared run dev" "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.test: npm -w shared run test && npm -w server run test
